characters.appearance: 2D cartoon illustration of a young woman. Light skin, brown hair in a bun, simple features.
characters.wardrobe: Red short-sleeved top, blue jeans, white sneakers.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable problem: studying English for years but still lacking speaking confidence.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as a practical, real-world solution.
- Delivers the emotional payoff of speaking English without hesitation in daily life.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैंने फर्राटेदार English बोलना कैसे शुरू किया।
स्कूल में English पढ़ी, कई apps try किये, फिर भी किसी से English में बात करने में डर लगता था।
फिर मुझे Supernova मिला - और सब बदल गया।
इसमें आप AI Tutor के साथ real-life situations (जैसे interview या office) की practice कर सकते हैं।
जब से मैंने Supernova इस्तेमाल करना शुरू किया है, मेरा confidence एकदम बढ़ गया है।
अब मैं बिना झिझक English बोल सकती हूँ!
[How I started speaking fluent English.
Studied English in school, tried many apps, but still felt scared to talk to anyone in English.
Then I found Supernova - and everything changed.
Here you can practice real-life situations (like interviews or office) with an AI Tutor.
Since I started using Supernova, my confidence has completely shot up.
Now I can speak English without hesitation!]
